pkgmetadata.longdescription: public and privateThis library provides two very simple decorators that document thepublicness of the names in your module. They keep your modules __all__in sync so you dont have to.Authorpublic is Copyright (C) 2016-2022 Barry Warsaw barrypython.orgLicensed under the terms of the Apache License Version 2.0. See the LICENSEfile for details.Project details Project home httpsgitlab.comwarsawpublic Report bugs at httpsgitlab.comwarsawpublicissues Code hosting httpsgitlab.comwarsawpublic.git Documentation httpspublic.readthedocs.io PyPI httpspypi.python.orgpypiatpublic
